---
title: "Methods"
---

See the corresponding section of [MANUSCRIPT_DRAFT.md](MANUSCRIPT_DRAFT.md)
for full prose with citations.

This book chapter will host:

- Per-script methods notes (chunked from the manuscript Methods)
- Embedded sessionInfo() output
- A live snippet showing the propensity-score formula and resulting balance
- Embed of the methods schematic (`outputs/figures/Figure_methods_schematic.png`)

(Stub — to be filled by the user during manuscript drafting.)
